channel.title: GitHub PHP Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of PHP in GitHub

item.title: BookStackApp/BookStack
item.description: A platform to create documentation/wiki content built with PHP & Laravel

item.title: laravel/framework
item.description: The Laravel Framework.

item.title: snipe/snipe-it
item.description: A free open source IT asset/license management system

item.title: PHPOffice/PhpSpreadsheet
item.description: A pure PHP library for reading and writing spreadsheet files

item.title: opencart/opencart
item.description: A free shopping cart system. OpenCart is an open source PHP-based online e-commerce solution.

item.title: phpstan/phpstan
item.description: PHP Static Analysis Tool - discover bugs in your code without running it!

item.title: DenverCoder1/github-readme-streak-stats
item.description: 🔥 Stay motivated and show off your contribution streak! 🌟 Display your total contributions, current streak, and longest streak on your GitHub profile README

item.title: SpartnerNL/Laravel-Excel
item.description: 🚀 Supercharged Excel exports and imports in Laravel

item.title: larastan/larastan
item.description: ⚗️ Adds code analysis to Laravel improving developer productivity and code quality.

item.title: Leantime/leantime
item.description: Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

item.title: woocommerce/woocommerce
item.description: A customizable, open-source ecommerce platform built on WordPress. Build any commerce solution you can imagine.

item.title: MISP/MISP
item.description: MISP (core software) - Open Source Threat Intelligence and Sharing Platform

item.title: firefly-iii/firefly-iii
item.description: Firefly III: a personal finances manager

item.title: phpstan/phpstan-src
item.description: PHPStan's source code. This is where development happens. Check https://github.com/phpstan/phpstan for the distribution repository.

item.title: filamentphp/filament
item.description: A collection of beautiful full-stack components for Laravel. The perfect starting point for your next app. Using Livewire, Alpine.js and Tailwind CSS.

item.title: espocrm/espocrm
item.description: EspoCRM – Open Source CRM Application

item.title: symfony/symfony
item.description: The Symfony PHP framework

item.title: pterodactyl/panel
item.description: Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

item.title: barryvdh/laravel-ide-helper
item.description: IDE Helper for Laravel

item.title: invoiceninja/invoiceninja
item.description: A source-available invoice, quote, project and time-tracking app built with Laravel

item.title: rectorphp/rector
item.description: Instant Upgrades and Automated Refactoring of any PHP 5.3+ code

item.title: PrivateBin/PrivateBin
item.description: A minimalist, open source online pastebin where the server has zero knowledge of pasted data. Data is encrypted/decrypted in the browser using 256 bits AES.
